script.dialogue: Dorothea? What are you doing out here by yourself?
Ah. Hello, Annette. I just needed a moment of quiet—but now that you’re here, why don’t we catch up? I love what you’ve done with your makeup—it’s such a pretty shade of pink.
O-oh! Thanks! I made it myself, actually—the same way you taught me ages ago.
Huh. I’d forgotten all about that.
With how expensive cosmetics are these days, being able to mix my own has helped me save a lot of money. Your lessons really came in handy!
I’m happy to hear that. And it looks like that wasn’t the only advice of mine you took—you’ve had this wonderful elegant air about you lately.

You think? I’m pretty sure I’m still the same old scatterbrained Annette you remember. Just the other day I got my kitchen duty shifts mixed up! And the day before that, I tripped during morning drills and made a complete fool of myself.
Hm, whatever you say.
Anyway… There’s actually something that I wanted to talk to you about. Somewhat related, in a way.
Well, consider me curious. What’s up?
Here. I found these while cleaning my room earlier today.
These… These are the earrings I gave you! They’re still in pretty good shape.
I polished them up a little, but yes. They’d been sitting in a drawer in my desk for the past five years—I left the monastery in a bit of a hurry, so a lot of things got left behind.
And the truth is… I’ve never actually worn them. Not that I didn’t appreciate you giving them to me, but… I didn’t feel like I was worthy of them.
Worthy? I’m not sure I understand.
I don’t blame you. It’s a bit silly, looking back on it—but I guess I was a bit of a silly person then, too. They just looked like something a refined lady would wear—someone like you, not me.
But you were helping me feel a bit more confident in myself—so I decided that wearing them would be my reward for after I mastered all the advice you gave me.
Aw. That’s actually kind of sweet. I didn’t realize those lessons meant so much to you.
Of course they did! Not just because they were helpful, but because I got to spend more time with you.
I-is that so? Haha! It seems you really did learn a thing or two from me.
Hm? What’s that supposed to mean?
Oh, nothing. Don’t worry about it.
More importantly: are you going to try them on now? I think you’ve more than earned it.
Hm. I think there’s one more thing I want to do first. Something I’m going to need your help with…
Dorothea and Annette have reached Support Rank A.
